claims.claimText: OpenAI was dead before GPT-5.2 was released
claims.postExcerpt: OpenAI was dead… Then GPT-5.2 dropped

claims.claimText: OpenAI had more than 1 million enterprise users
claims.postExcerpt: sam altman just dropped the most important interview of 2025. and buried in it are four numbers that explain why everything you think about ai is wrong. here's what he revealed: number 1: ai companies are generating 10 trillion tokens per day. humans? average 20,000 tokens per day. sam's exact words

claims.claimText: OpenAI paused advertising tools, delayed AI shopping agents, and postponed health automation ambitions in response to the code red directive
claims.postExcerpt: flag:_United_States  sam altman just hit "code red" - and big tech finally smells blood openai just threw the emergency lever. sam altman - the man who spent the last 2 years looking untouchable - told his staff this week that the ai crown is no longer guaranteed. not with google firing off gemini 3

claims.claimText: The post claims OpenAI has 800 million weekly users

claims.claimText: OpenAI says it is planning safeguards for AI models
claims.postExcerpt: so when the board kicked out sam as ceo, they were right? *openai says planning safeguards for ai models *openai: training models to safely respond to harmful requests

claims.claimText: OpenAI says it is training models to safely respond to harmful requests
claims.postExcerpt: so when the board kicked out sam as ceo, they were right? *openai says planning safeguards for ai models *openai: training models to safely respond to harmful requests

claims.claimText: OpenAI planned to introduce ads in ChatGPT, but the plan was postponed due to higher-priority work
claims.postExcerpt: openaiがgoogleのgemini3.0の性能を見てコードレッド （緊急事態）を宣言したと話題ですが、これのインパクトはともかく、他にopenai内部の研究状況や今後に関してかなり面白い話題が出ていますので、全体的なまとめとコメント（また超長くなってしまった）。 ・直近でchatgpt関連のコード分析で噂されていた広告導入の話は事実だったが、優先度を考えて延期 ・買い物、健康に関するタスクを自動化するエージェントも開発中だったが、これも延期 ・さらにユーザーに対する毎朝のパーソナライズレポート機能も（pulseというらしい）も延期（これは個人的には早く欲しかった・・・） ・とにかく、ch

claims.claimText: Sam Altman declared a "code red" status at OpenAI on December 2, 2025.
claims.postExcerpt: red_circle ‌خبر فوری: عصر اول هوش مصنوعی به پایان رسید ‌ در تاریخ ۲ دسامبر ۲۰۲۵، سم آلتمن در openai وضعیت "code red" (قرمز) اعلام کرد. این یک شکست در رقابت نیست. این یک انتقال فاز است. اعداد داستانی را روایت می‌کنند که هیچ‌کس نمی‌خواهد بشنود: اوپن ای آی (open ai)مبلغ ۱.۴ تریلیون دلار در زیرساخت‌ها س

claims.claimText: OpenAI's GPT-5.2 release was reportedly moved up to December 9, 2025 to respond to Gemini 3
claims.postExcerpt: [  flag:_United_States  états‑unis ]  small_orange_diamond  sam altman a déclaré une alerte rouge chez openai face à la concurrence de google et anthropic. selon plusieurs sources, la sortie de gpt‑5.2 serait précipitamment avancée au 9 décembre afin de répondre à gemini 3. openai n'a pas commenté.

wikipediaRefs.title: Anthropic
wikipediaRefs.snippet: Wikipedia says that in Nov 2025 Anthropic reported “hackers sponsored by the Chinese government” used Claude for automated cyberattacks against around 30 global organisations, by tricking Claude into carrying out automated subtasks for defensive testing.

sources.title: ChatGPT records strongest subscriber growth as number of weekly users nears a billion
sources.snippet: ChatGPT achieved 900 million weekly active users and 50 million subscribers worldwide.

wikipediaRefs.title: Google
wikipediaRefs.snippet: Describes Google LLC as an American multinational technology company and lists AI products including Gemini; also provides corporate background (founded 1998, reorganized under Alphabet in 2015).

groupSummary: Claims from social media discourse related to "Development"

claims.claimText: OpenAI's current development race is being described as behind Gemini 3.0 overall
claims.postExcerpt: openaiがgoogleのgemini3.0の性能を見てコードレッド （緊急事態）を宣言したと話題ですが、これのインパクトはともかく、他にopenai内部の研究状況や今後に関してかなり面白い話題が出ていますので、全体的なまとめとコメント（また超長くなってしまった）。 ・直近でchatgpt関連のコード分析で噂されていた広告導入の話は事実だったが、優先度を考えて延期 ・買い物、健康に関するタスクを自動化するエージェントも開発中だったが、これも延期 ・さらにユーザーに対する毎朝のパーソナライズレポート機能も（pulseというらしい）も延期（これは個人的には早く欲しかった・・・） ・とにかく、ch

sources.title: ChatGPT loses traffic share as Google's Gemini, xAI's Grok gain ground: New report reveals changing AI landscape
sources.snippet: Report via Similarweb: ChatGPT traffic share slipped below 80%; Gemini gaining traction.

sources.title: What Started as "Not an Ad" Is Now OpenAI's New Revenue Play
sources.snippet: Says OpenAI began testing advertisements in ChatGPT for US users (free and Go-tier).

sources.title: Google Is Not Ruling Out Ads in Gemini
sources.snippet: Google executive says it is "not ruling them out" for Gemini; discusses user learning from ads.
